# Writing Skills

> Augmentation-only Claude Agent Skills for fiction writers — tuned for
> ambitious beginners and self-published authors. Each skill reads, analyses,
> critiques, or drills — and never writes the author's prose. Usable in any
> Claude session, or connected to a real manuscript over the Calliope MCP
> connector (https://writecalliope.ink/features/mcp).

The one rule: no skill writes or rewrites prose. "tends canon" means it can write
findings to a Calliope Map/marginalia over MCP (with a subscription), never prose.

## Editorial
- [developmental-editor](skills/editorial/developmental-editor/SKILL.md): big-picture edit letter — structure, pacing, arc, stakes. tends canon.
- [line-editor](skills/editorial/line-editor/SKILL.md): sentence craft — rhythm, clarity, voice, overwriting. tends canon.
- [copy-editor](skills/editorial/copy-editor/SKILL.md): grammar, punctuation, consistency, house style, flagged with the rule. tends canon.
- [continuity-editor](skills/editorial/continuity-editor/SKILL.md): flags contradictions in facts and timeline; pairs with the Map. tends canon.

## Character
- [reverse-character-cards](skills/character/reverse-character-cards/SKILL.md): reverse-engineers character cards from the manuscript. tends canon.
- [character-card-builder](skills/character/character-card-builder/SKILL.md): builds a character card from scratch, interview-style. tends canon.

## Critique
- [beta-reader-panel](skills/critique/beta-reader-panel/SKILL.md): distinct beta-reader personas react chapter by chapter. tends canon.
- [agent-first-pages](skills/critique/agent-first-pages/SKILL.md): a literary agent's slush-pile read of the opening. read-only.
- [workshop-critique](skills/critique/workshop-critique/SKILL.md): a Milford/Clarion-style multi-voice critique. read-only.

## Craft drills
- [dialogue-gym](skills/craft/dialogue-gym/SKILL.md): theory → drill → you write → ranked feedback, on dialogue. read-only.
- [scene-architecture](skills/craft/scene-architecture/SKILL.md): scene structure drills, scored. read-only.
- [psychic-distance](skills/craft/psychic-distance/SKILL.md): POV distance drills, ranked. read-only.
- [prose-rhythm](skills/craft/prose-rhythm/SKILL.md): sentence rhythm drills, scored. read-only.
